info.title: Book Corners API
info.description: REST API for discovering, submitting, and reporting little free libraries. Provides geospatial search, user authentication, and community moderation workflows.

post.summary: Social login with native identity token
post.description:
Exchange a native Apple/Google identity token for a JWT token pair.
Creates or links accounts automatically based on email matching.

Create a new user account and return a JWT token pair.
Validates username uniqueness, email format, and password strength.

Authenticate with username or email and return a JWT token pair.
Returns 401 for invalid credentials or 429 when rate-limited.

Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token.
Returns 401 if the refresh token is invalid or expired.

get.description:
Return the profile of the currently authenticated user.
Requires a valid JWT access token in the Authorization header.

delete.description:
Permanently delete the authenticated user's account.
Regular users verify with password; social-only users must send confirm_text=DELETE.

patch.description:
Update the authenticated user's email address.
Blocked for social-only accounts whose email is managed by their provider.

put.description:
Change the authenticated user's password.
Blocked for social-only accounts who authenticate via their provider instead.

parameters.name: q

schema.description: Free-text search query matched against name and description (full-text ranked).
schema.title: Q

parameters.description: Free-text search query matched against name and description (full-text ranked).

parameters.name: search

schema.description: Global search across name, description, city, address, and postal code. Supports substring matches and outranks `q` when both are provided.
schema.title: Search

parameters.description: Global search across name, description, city, address, and postal code. Supports substring matches and outranks `q` when both are provided.

parameters.name: country

schema.description: Filter by ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code.
schema.title: Country

parameters.description: Filter by ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code.

parameters.name: postal_code

schema.description: Filter by postal or ZIP code.
schema.title: Postal Code

parameters.description: Filter by postal or ZIP code.

parameters.name: lat

schema.description: Latitude for proximity search (requires lng and radius_km).
schema.title: Lat

parameters.description: Latitude for proximity search (requires lng and radius_km).

parameters.name: lng

schema.description: Longitude for proximity search (requires lat and radius_km).
schema.title: Lng

parameters.description: Longitude for proximity search (requires lat and radius_km).

parameters.name: radius_km

schema.description: Search radius in kilometres (requires lat and lng).
schema.title: Radius Km

parameters.description: Search radius in kilometres (requires lat and lng).

parameters.name: has_photo

schema.description: Filter by photo presence: true for libraries with a photo, false for those without.
schema.title: Has Photo

parameters.description: Filter by photo presence: true for libraries with a photo, false for those without.

get.description:
Return a paginated list of approved libraries with optional search filters.
Supports text, field, and proximity filtering with configurable pagination.

post.description:
Create a new library submission from an authenticated user.
Validates the photo and fields, then persists as pending for moderation.

examples: A cozy little free library near the park entrance.
description.title: Description

address.description: Street address of the library. May be empty only when coordinates (latitude and longitude) are provided — e.g. libraries inside a park with no street address.
address.title: Address

city.description: City where the library is located.
city.title: City

wheelchair_accessible.description: Wheelchair accessibility: yes, no, or limited.
wheelchair_accessible.title: Wheelchair Accessible

is_indoor.description: Whether the library is inside a building.
is_indoor.title: Is Indoor

is_lit.description: Whether the library is illuminated at night.
is_lit.title: Is Lit

get.description:
Return the most recent approved libraries as a flat list.
Provides a lightweight endpoint for newest-first results without pagination.

Return all countries that have at least one approved library.
Ordered by library count descending, without a top-N limit.

Return the authenticated user's favourite libraries, newest-favourited first.
Only includes libraries that are still in approved status.

Return aggregate moderation counts for staff users.
Non-staff authenticated users receive a structured 403 response.

allOf.description:

schema.description: Filter by ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code.

get.description:
Return all library submissions for staff users.
Supports status, text, country, source, and pagination filters.

Supports the same filters as the all-library staff list.

get.description:
Return user-submitted reports for staff users.
Supports status, reason, and pagination filters.

patch.description:
Update a user report moderation status as a staff user.
Allows staff clients to reopen, resolve, or dismiss reports.

get.summary: List community photos for staff moderation

parameters.name: status

allOf.description:
Community photo status filter values for staff moderation.
Supports listing all photos or one concrete photo status.
allOf.title: PhotoModerationStatusFilterEnum

schema.description: Filter by photo status, or all.

parameters.description: Filter by photo status, or all.

get.description:
Return community photos for staff users.
Supports status and pagination filters.

patch.summary: Update a community photo moderation status
patch.description:
Update a community photo moderation status as a staff user.
Approving a photo promotes it to the parent library's primary image.

get.summary: Get a library for staff moderation
get.description:
Return any library by slug for staff users.
Includes pending and rejected libraries that public endpoints hide.

patch.description:
Update a library moderation status as a staff user.
Applies the same cache and notification side effects as the manage UI.

get.description:
Return a single library by its slug.
Pending libraries are visible only to their authenticated owner.

patch.summary: Update one of your submitted libraries
patch.description:
Update a submitted library owned by the authenticated user.
Owner edits return pending and require moderator approval.

examples: A cozy little free library near the park entrance.

address.description: Street address of the library. May be empty when coordinates identify the location.
address.title: Address

city.description: City where the library is located.
city.title: City

wheelchair_accessible.description: Wheelchair accessibility: yes, no, or limited.
wheelchair_accessible.title: Wheelchair Accessible

is_indoor.description: Whether the library is inside a building.
is_indoor.title: Is Indoor

is_lit.description: Whether the library is illuminated at night.
is_lit.title: Is Lit

latitude.description: Latitude of the library (WGS 84). Must be provided with longitude.
latitude.title: Latitude

longitude.description: Longitude of the library (WGS 84). Must be provided with latitude.
longitude.title: Longitude

post.summary: Report an issue with a library
post.description:
Create a report about an approved library from an authenticated user.
Validates optional photo and persists the report as open for moderation.

reason.description:
Enumeration of valid report reasons matching model choices.
Keeps API and database reason values in sync.
reason.title: ReportReasonEnum

details.description: Optional free-text details about the issue.
examples: The door hinge is broken and books are getting wet.
details.title: Details

post.summary: Submit a community photo for a library
post.description:
Submit a community photo for an approved library.
Validates the photo and enforces per-user limits before persisting.

examples: A sunny day at the library.
caption.title: Caption

post.description:
Add an approved library to the authenticated user's favourites.
Returns 201 if newly added, 200 if already favourited.

delete.description:
Remove an approved library from the authenticated user's favourites.
Returns 204 whether the favourite existed or not (idempotent).

get.description:
Return aggregate statistics about approved libraries.
Includes totals, top countries, and cumulative growth series.

TokenPairOut.description:
JWT access and refresh token pair.
Returned on successful registration or login.
TokenPairOut.title: TokenPairOut

ErrorOut.description:
Shared error response schema for all API endpoints.
Provides a consistent error shape with optional structured details.

details.description: Optional structured details about the error, such as field-level validation failures.
details.title: Details

ErrorOut.title: ErrorOut

SocialLoginIn.description:
Social login payload for exchanging a native identity token for JWT.
Used by iOS/Android apps that authenticate via Apple or Google SDKs.

id_token.description: Identity token JWT from the native SDK.
id_token.title: Id Token

first_name.description: Optional first name (Apple only provides on first sign-in).
first_name.title: First Name

last_name.description: Optional last name (Apple only provides on first sign-in).
last_name.title: Last Name

SocialLoginIn.title: SocialLoginIn

RegisterIn.description:
Registration payload for creating a new user account.
All fields are required and validated server-side.

password.description: Password (8-128 characters, validated against Django password policies).
password.title: Password

RegisterIn.title: RegisterIn

LoginIn.description:
Login payload for authenticating with credentials.
Accepts username or email address plus password.
LoginIn.title: LoginIn

AccessTokenOut.description:
Single JWT access token.
Returned when refreshing an expired access token.
AccessTokenOut.title: AccessTokenOut

RefreshIn.description:
Token refresh payload containing the refresh token.
Used to obtain a new access token without re-authenticating.

refresh.description: Refresh token obtained from login or registration.
refresh.title: Refresh

RefreshIn.title: RefreshIn

MeOut.description:
Current authenticated user profile.
Returns basic account information and authentication type.

is_social_only.description: True when the account uses social login only (no local password). Email and password changes are unavailable for these accounts.
is_social_only.title: Is Social Only

is_staff.description: True when the account can access staff-only moderation endpoints.
is_staff.title: Is Staff

MeOut.title: MeOut

DeleteAccountIn.description:
Payload for confirming account deletion.
Regular users must provide their password; social-only users must send confirm_text=DELETE.

password.description: Current account password (required for non-social accounts).
password.title: Password

confirm_text.description: Type 'DELETE' to confirm (required for social-only accounts that have no password).
confirm_text.title: Confirm Text

DeleteAccountIn.title: DeleteAccountIn

ChangeEmailIn.description:
Payload for changing the user's email address.
The new email must be unique across all accounts.
ChangeEmailIn.title: ChangeEmailIn

ChangePasswordIn.description:
Payload for changing the user's password.
Requires current password for verification and new password with confirmation.

new_password.description: New password (validated against Django password policies).
new_password.title: New Password

ChangePasswordIn.title: ChangePasswordIn

StatisticsOut.description:
Aggregate platform statistics for approved libraries.
Includes totals, geographic breakdown, and growth over time.

total_with_image.title: Total With Image

top_countries.description: Top 10 countries by number of approved libraries.
top_countries.title: Top Countries

cumulative_series.description: Cumulative growth time series of approved libraries.
cumulative_series.title: Cumulative Series

StatisticsOut.title: StatisticsOut

TimeSeriesPointOut.description:
A single data point in the cumulative growth time series.
Represents the running total of approved libraries at a given period.

period.description: Date or month label (YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DD for month start).
period.title: Period

cumulative_count.description: Running total of approved libraries up to this period.
cumulative_count.title: Cumulative Count

TimeSeriesPointOut.title: TimeSeriesPointOut
